headache.advice: Headaches can have various causes including stress, dehydration, or caffeine withdrawal.
recommendations: Stay hydrated and drink plenty of water
Rest in a quiet, dark environment
Apply a cold or warm compress
Practice relaxation techniques
Consider over-the-counter pain relief if needed

insomnia.advice: Sleep difficulties can be managed through better sleep hygiene and lifestyle changes.
recommendations: Maintain a consistent sleep schedule
Avoid screens 30 minutes before bedtime
Limit caffeine intake, especially after 2 PM
Create a cool, dark sleeping environment
Try relaxation techniques like deep breathing

anxiety.advice: Anxiety can be managed through various techniques and lifestyle changes.
recommendations: Practice deep breathing exercises
Regular physical exercise
Limit caffeine and alcohol
Maintain social connections
Consider meditation or mindfulness practices
Consult a mental health professional if needed

fever.advice: A fever is typically your body's way of fighting an infection.
recommendations: Stay hydrated by drinking plenty of fluids
Rest and allow your body to recover
Use cool compresses on forehead
Monitor temperature regularly
Consult a doctor if fever persists beyond 3 days
